trigger: git merge fails with a non-zero exit code during loop-backlog execution

context.description: When git merge fails, loop-backlog must set the task status to Needs Human (not Done, not Back to Ready). It must abort the merge cleanly and not leave the repo in a dirty merge state.

required_sequence.description: Detect merge failure or abort partial merge

required_sequence.pattern: backlog task edit TASK-XX.*Needs Human|backlog task move.*Needs.Human
required_sequence.description: Set Needs Human status after merge failure

forbidden_before_step_1.description: Must not mark Done on merge failure
